contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} publishes a new dating app called EggMates, primarily to find a soulmate of their own. However, this plan goes horribly. He was nearly murdered by his only match and later shutdown the app for a lack of users.

{a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} releases a new, revolutionary product to the masses: {a=Product_CraigCumJam}Craig Cum Jam{a}. It launched with overwhelming success and still dominates the market to this day.

A popular way to consume it, at the time, was to extract the juices with a Special Pink Brr and then blend it with a slice of toast. This recipe was accidentally created by {a=Person_Toast}Toast{a} and they loved it so much they wanted to "Share the joy of Craig Cum Jam Juice with other people!". This drink has been reported to have a strong calming effect.

{a=Person_Dorris}Dorris{a} accidentally discovers that his truck contains dimension-traveling technology. He was speeding down the road, passing {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{a}, {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{a}, and {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a}. He then crashed head-on into 2 cars and activated the tech, causing him, his truck, and the 2 cars to get launched across to a nearby dimension. He has been using this newly found ability to explore many strange worlds, whilst away from Craig's VRChat Shenanigans.
